consumerTone: plain English; educational organ-system and complex-condition genetics context only; no diagnosis, personal risk estimate, symptom inference, lab/imaging/vital/organ-function inference, severity, prognosis, screening, prevention, testing, treatment, medication, supplement, diet, exercise, clearance, emergency, all-clear, or clinical actionability claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: validated respiratory genetic model, original calibration details, ancestry applicability metadata, spirometry, oxygen saturation, pulmonary diagnosis, asthma or COPD context, cystic fibrosis context, infection history, symptoms, imaging, medication list, exercise tolerance, pediatric context, and clinician review unavailable in this fixture; public sample PDF risk cards, recommendation rows, impact/evidence ratings, and visible variant tables observed for output structure

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable respiratory model calibration, clinical diagnosis, symptoms, spirometry, oxygen saturation, imaging, infection history, medication context, and personal recommendation context explicitly; do not infer diagnosis, personal risk, medication need, supplement need, lab values, lung function, exercise clearance, or treatment guidance.
